# Process Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 1785ae90-fe27-4702-8243-51366573c1a0
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can knowledge be accidentally true?](can-knowledge-be-accidentally-true-antithesis-293a329b-74f2-4a3f-a4e3-672da4cfe7c6.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief generated by dependable cognitive processes**, **A person knows a proposition if those cognitive processes typically yield true beliefs**, **A belief is true if it objectively represents how things are**, **The reliability of the process is essential for knowledge**
